title: Simply Delightful Pots
description: An addon that adds Farmer Delight items to the Simply Pots loot table
body:
An addon that adds Farmers Delight items to the pots of Simply pots.

The items depend on what pot is broken and correspond to the biome they are found in.

Farmer's Delight : [https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
